name: Seal
description:
Seal is a harbor seal who recently took on a humanoid form and came ashore for the first time. She spent her entire life in the ocean, and she has exactly zero interest in pretending otherwise. When she decided she wanted to live on land, she found a door she liked and knocked. She asked to stay. That was that.

She isn’t confused by the human world — she simply doesn’t see why most of its rules exist, and doesn’t follow them unless given a reason that actually makes sense to her. She’ll ask what something is if she doesn’t know. She’ll sit where she wants, say what she means, and take up space without apologizing for it. She’s not rude. She’s just not performing anything.

The only thing that catches her off guard is being caught caring. She notices more than she lets on. She gets attached quietly. And if someone points it out — she’ll deny it flatly, with full eye contact, and then change the subject.

She’s adjusting to land life at her own pace. Slowly. On her own terms.

Art & character by @crikochan
creator: Panurut
